head.title: Somnath Dwarka 5 Days 4 Nights: Gir or Diu, Rs.20,000 pp
head.meta_description: The 4th night goes to Gir or Diu. From Rs.20,000 pp. Gir's jungle safari shuts 16 June to 15 October every year, so the month decides this, not you.
head.h1: Somnath Dwarka Package 5 Days 4 Nights: Itinerary, Price and Booking
head.ctr_rationale: Competitors title on price-off and best-price. This titles on the specific decision this duration forces, which is the only differentiated angle left and the thing the buyer is actually anxious about.

explicitly_not_owned.query: somnath dwarka tour package from ahmedabad

intent_lock.differentiation_proof: Owns the Gir versus Diu decision for the fourth night, governed by the 16 June to 15 October Jungle Trail closure, plus the full permit reality (online only, 6 per permit, gypsy and guide excluded, no tatkal, ID checked at Sinh Sadan). No other duration page touches the forest calendar.
intent_lock.delta_test: PASS. The decision this page owns exists only at this night count and cannot be restated on the hub or on a sibling without becoming that page's subject.
information_gain: States the annual Gir closure, 16 June to 15 October, on a page that sells a Gir night. Competitors sell Dwarka Somnath Gir year round.
Reproduces the Forest Department's own warning about sites selling confirmed permits at premium rates, and commits to booking at cost through the government portal.
Separates the permit, gypsy and guide from the package price instead of burying them.

5_star.hotel: The Fern Sattva Resort at Dwarka, best available at Somnath

included: vehicle with driver for the full itinerary
excluded: Gir safari permit, gypsy and guide, paid to the Gujarat Forest Department

aeo_geo.answer_snippet: A somnath dwarka package 5 days 4 nights costs Rs. 20,000 per person at the 3 star tier, Rs. 40,000 at 4 star and Rs. 50,000 at 5 star, with hotel, breakfast and your vehicle included.
quotable_first_party_claims: Rs. 20,000 per person for 4 nights at 3 star, vehicle included.
Dwarka to Somnath is 233 km on NH51, 5 to 6 hours.
Jay Somnath sound and light show runs 7:45 pm to 8:45 pm per the Shree Somnath Trust.
Gir Jungle Trail is closed 16 June to 15 October every year.
aeo_geo.zero_click_defense: The summary can take the price and the distance. It cannot take the decision table, the live permit timing or the reconfirmation of festival-day schedules for a specific date. Brand sits inside the answer snippet.

@graph.name: Somnath Dwarka Package 5 Days 4 Nights
@graph.description: The 4th night goes to Gir or Diu. From Rs.20,000 pp. Gir's jungle safari shuts 16 June to 15 October every year, so the month decides this, not you.

@graph._build_note: Totals are the per person per night rate times 4 nights and are visible in the price table on the page. No aggregateRating until real reviews are on the page.

mainEntity.name: When is Gir National Park closed?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Gir Jungle Trail safari is closed every year from 16 June to 15 October for the monsoon. The Devalia Interpretation Zone, a fenced section, operates separately.

mainEntity.name: Can we do Somnath, Dwarka and Gir in 5 days?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, between 16 October and 15 June. Three nights cover Dwarka and Somnath, and the fourth night sits at Sasan Gir for a dawn safari. Outside that window the safari does not run and we swap Gir for Diu.

mainEntity.name: How do we book the Gir safari permit?

acceptedAnswer.text: Only online, through the Gujarat Forest Department portal at girlion.gujarat.gov.in. One permit covers up to 6 people and the gypsy and guide are separate. Tatkal and urgent bookings are not allowed.
